sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51402" key="i)triopw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰτριοπώλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n51402.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealer in</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴτρια</foreign>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
